# Subscription Orders

This section summarizes policies for subscription orders, covering which purchases qualify, what discounts apply, and how a subscriber can pause or cancel. It consolidates guidance on subscription-eligibility, subscription-discounts, subscription-pausing, and subscription-cancellation for managing the subscription lifecycle.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#subscription-orders]
